info.title: Replace localhost with Render backend URL in frontend deployment

parts.text: i have deployed the backend in the render https://visual-interaction-backend.onrender.com/health with this url now in frontend where you find http://localhost:5000 replace it with render url

parts.text:
I see the code. For web, it's currently using `http://localhost:5000`. I need to replace this with the Render URL `https://visual-interaction-backend.onrender.com`. 

Note that the Render URL uses HTTPS, not HTTP. So I need to change `http://localhost:5000` to `https://visual-interaction-backend.onrender.com`.

I've updated the main api_service.dart file. The other occurrences are in documentation files (docs/run-guide.txt, docs/setup-guide.md, README.md). Those are just documentation for local development, so they probably don't need to be changed since they're guide files for developers. But the user asked to replace "where you find http://localhost:5000", so they might want me to update those too.

Let me also check if there are any .env files or other configuration files that need updating.

Updated `frontend/lib/services/api_service.dart:8`. 

The documentation files (docs/*.md, README.md) contain localhost references for local development guides - those can stay as-is since they're meant for developers running locally. Do you want me to update those too?
